summary: PayPal stock is down 31.4% in six months, but AI commerce, Venmo expansion and global PYUSD rollout could shape its next recovery phase.

headline: Michael Burry Just Did Another 'Big Short' — As Historic Chip Stock Rally Finally Snaps
summary: Michael Burry disclosed January 2027 puts on SOXX struck at $330. The chip ETF snapped its longest-ever rally — and 7 constituents report earnings this week.

headline: Elon Musk set to face off against Sam Altman in OpenAI trial
summary: Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) CEO Elon Musk is set to meet OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) CEO Sam Altman in court this week over an alleged breach of the private AI developer's non-profit mission. Musk is also a co-founder of OpenAI. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland break down the details of the court case.

headline: PayPal Brings New Commerce-Grade Identity Solution to Advertising Industry
summary: Most identity solutions in advertising are built on estimates, guesswork, or probabilistic signals. Today, PayPal changes that by introducing something different: PayPal Ads ID, an advertising identifier grounded in verified commerce relationships.

raw.headline: PayPal Brings New Commerce-Grade Identity Solution to Advertising Industry

headline: Digital Payment Update - AI's Double Role: Fueling and Fighting E-Commerce Fraud
summary: Recent developments in the digital payment and e-commerce sectors highlight a significant increase in fraud, with global e-commerce fraud losses projected to more than double from $40 billion in 2024 to over $100 billion by 2029. This surge is attributed to rising transaction volumes, identity fraud, social engineering, and crypto scam escalations. Artificial intelligence is playing a dual role by facilitating more sophisticated attacks while also enhancing fraud detection tools. As fraud...
